title: From Errors to Solutions: LLM-Powered Command Scripting for FPGA Cad Tools
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Computer-aided design (CAD) tools provide hundreds or even thousands of options that control various optimizations throughout the design flow. While this flexibility is powerful, it requires significant experience to be familiar with those options and effectively utilize them. For example, when a design fails, in many cases errors can be resolved by adjusting the CAD tool options rather than modifying the design itself. In this work, we propose VPR-LLM, a tool that utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate error resolution in the open-source FPGA CAD tool Verilog-to-Routing (VTR) by modifying the command-line options used to run the tool. VPRLLM parses error logs, VTR help messages, and documentation, then utilizes an LLM to generate modified command-line options that resolve the issue. VPR-LLM supports various LLM models and prompting techniques. All these models and techniques are evaluated and compared in terms of efficiency and cost. To evaluate our method, we proposed a dataset of 26 VTR run failures spanning five distinct error categories. The proposed technique successfully resolved 80 % of the cases without requiring any fine-tuning to the LLM model, demonstrating the effectiveness of VPR-LLM. This work represents an initial step toward AI-assisted debugging in CAD flows, where LLMs can enhance productivity by automatically identifying and correcting tool configurations.
title_zh: 从错误到解决方案：基于LLM的FPGA CAD工具命令脚本生成
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助设计（CAD）工具提供了数百甚至数千种选项，用于控制设计流程中的各种优化。虽然这种灵活性非常强大，但需要丰富的经验才能熟悉这些选项并有效利用它们。例如，当设计失败时，在许多情况下可以通过调整CAD工具选项来解决错误，而无需修改设计本身。在本研究中，我们提出了VPR-LLM，这是一种利用大型语言模型（LLMs）通过修改运行工具的命令行选项来自动解决开源FPGA CAD工具Verilog-to-Routing（VTR）中的错误的工具。VPR-LLM解析错误日志、VTR帮助信息和文档，然后利用LLM生成修改后的命令行选项以解决问题。VPR-LLM支持多种LLM模型和提示技术，并对这些模型和技术的效率和成本进行了评估和比较。为了评估我们的方法，我们提出了一个包含26个VTR运行失败案例的数据集，涵盖五个不同的错误类别。所提出的技术在无需对LLM模型进行任何微调的情况下成功解决了80%的案例，证明了VPR-LLM的有效性。这项工作代表了CAD流程中AI辅助调试的初步探索，LLMs可以通过自动识别和修正工具配置来提高生产力。

title: AI-Driven Formal Verification for Efficient and Scalable Design Validation
authors: Aparna Mohan, Sivakumar Karuppiah, Uday Ashokbhai Korat
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: As modern hardware and software designs grow increasingly complex, traditional formal verification techniques face critical challenges, including state space explosion and excessive computational cost, limiting their practical application in large-scale systems. This paper introduces a novel AI-driven formal verification framework that leverages machine learning models to intelligently guide and optimize the verification process. By predicting critical state exploration paths and automatically generating invariants, our approach significantly reduces the verification time and memory usage compared to conventional methods. We integrate a reinforcement learning agent with symbolic model checking, enabling adaptive decision-making that prioritizes relevant design regions while pruning irrelevant paths. Extensive experiments on benchmark hardware designs demonstrate up to 60% improvement in verification speed and substantial scalability gains without compromising correctness guarantees. The proposed method bridges the gap between rigorous formal guarantees and practical scalability, offering a transformative solution for efficient and automated design validation in the era of complex system development.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的形式化验证：高效且可扩展的设计验证方法
abstract_zh: 随着现代硬件和软件设计的日益复杂，传统的形式化验证技术面临诸多关键挑战，包括状态空间爆炸和过高的计算成本，这限制了其在大规模系统中的实际应用。本文提出了一种新颖的基于人工智能的形式化验证框架，该框架利用机器学习模型智能地引导和优化验证过程。通过预测关键状态探索路径和自动生成不变量，我们的方法相比传统方法显著减少了验证时间和内存使用。我们将强化学习代理与符号模型检查相结合，实现了自适应决策，优先处理相关设计区域，同时剪枝无关路径。在基准硬件设计上的广泛实验表明，该方法在验证速度上提高了多达60%，并在不牺牲正确性保证的前提下显著提升了可扩展性。所提出的方法弥合了严格形式化保证与实际可扩展性之间的差距，为复杂系统开发时代的高效自动化设计验证提供了一种变革性解决方案。
